samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Implement a frequency divider that divides the input clock frequency of 100MHz into 3 clock frequencies: 50MHz, 10MHz, and 1MHz.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal.</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="N">3</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[N-1:0]">count_100</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[N-1:0]">count_10</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        The module uses three counters to divide the input clock frequency.
        <assignment>
            CLK_1 = (count_100 == 49) ? ~CLK_1 : CLK_1;
            CLK_10 = (count_10 == 4) ? ~CLK_10 : CLK_10;
            CLK_50 = (count_50 == 1) ? ~CLK_50 : CLK_50;
        </assignment>
        <sequential_logic>
            <if>
                <condition>on the positive edge of CLK_in or RST</condition>
                <behavior>
                    if RST is active, count_50 is set to 0.
                    <assignment>count_50 = 0;</assignment>
                </behavior>
            </if>
            <if>
                <condition>when the counter count_50 equals 1</condition>
                <behavior>
                    count_50 is toggled by inverting its current value.
                    <assignment>count_50 = ~count_50;</assignment>
                </behavior>
            </if>
            <if>
                <condition>on the positive edge of CLK_in or RST</condition>
                <behavior>
                    if RST is active, count_10 is set to 0.
                    <assignment>count_10 = 0;</assignment>
                </behavior>
            </if>
            <if>
                <condition>when the counter count_10 equals 4</condition>
                <behavior>
                    count_10 is toggled by inverting its current value.
                    <assignment>count_10 = ~count_10;</assignment>
                </behavior>
            </if>
            <if>
                <condition>on the positive edge of CLK_in or RST</condition>
                <behavior>
                    if RST is active, count_100 is set to 0.
                    <assignment>count_100 = 0;</assignment>
                </behavior>
            </if>
            <if>
                <condition>when the counter count_100 equals 49</condition>
                <behavior>
                    count_100 is toggled by inverting its current value.
                    <assignment>count_100 = ~count_100;</assignment>
                </behavior>
            </if>
        </sequential_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
